title: jasminum lanceolaria
intro: Jasminum lanceolaria, also known as the lance-leaved jasmine, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Jasminum genus. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The lance-leaved jasmine is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and helping to manage menstrual disorders. The plant's leaves and flowers are often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed for their medicinal and therapeutic effects.
